The fix is in place. Here's what I found:

**Root cause:** In `/mnt/data/commons-server/src/dungeon/dungeon-manager.ts` line 275, `d_move` messages from the client were only accepted when `instance.status === "running"`. However, since every floor template has a boss (`boss_type_id: 1/2/3`), the boss is spawned at floor init time. On the very first tick, `/mnt/data/commons-server/src/dungeon/dungeon-loop.ts` line 601 sets `instance.status = "boss"` because the boss exists with HP > 0. From that ...(truncated)
